description_long: This is a tall, narrow, industrial-style filing cabinet with a dark, weathered metal finish. The cabinet features three vertically stacked drawers, each equipped with a rectangular label holder and a sturdy metal handle. The left side is plain, while the right side displays a vintage 'Snoopy' comic poster, adding a touch of character. The top surface is flat and robust, suitable for supporting additional items. The drawers are slightly ajar, revealing their boxy, utilitarian construction. The overall appearance suggests durability and a utilitarian design, suitable for urban or garage environments.
description: A tall, dark metal filing cabinet with three drawers, label holders, and a vintage comic poster on one side. It has a rugged, industrial look and sturdy handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers with handles and label holders, all slightly open.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain, dark metal surface and the depth of the drawers.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid, unadorned metal back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring a vintage 'Snoopy' comic poster and the side profiles of the drawers.
